projectDescription: A fan-made MUGEN fighting game character based on Raziel from Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver, featuring spectral-form sprites, multiple Soul Reaver palette variants, and a full set of normal, crouching, aerial, and throw attacks.
keyFeatures: Raziel in spectral (blue) form from Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver
Full normal move set: standing, crouching, and aerial attacks
Soul Reaver weapon system with palette-dependent visual overlays
Multiple palette variants (3 palettes) affecting character and Reaver appearance
AI-generated sprites created from scratch using modern tooling
Standard MUGEN 1.0 character format with .def, .cns, .cmd, .air, .sff, and .snd files
publicApiSurface: raziel.cmd — command/input definitions (Run Fwd, Run Back, Throw, Taunt, 6 stand normals, 6 crouch normals, 6 air normals)
raziel_core.cns — core data (life=1000, power=3000, attack=100, defence=100), state definitions, and Reaver explod system
raziel_reaver_visuals.cns — Soul Reaver visual overlay state controllers
